title: Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala

heroImage.alt: Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala, Maharashtra

overview.short: Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala is a Sikh Gurdwara in Chakala in Mumbai.
overview.description: Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala is a Sikh Gurdwara in Chakala in Mumbai. The Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha was founded by Shamsher Singh Jolly (1922–1992) to establish the Gurdwara, the Charitable Dispensary and the Guru Nanak Mission High School. The Gurdwara and Charitable Dispensary is located on Andheri Kurla Road, Amrit Nagar, Andheri East, Mumbai - 400093, Opposite Holy Family Church, Chakala. The Guru Nanak Mission High School is located at 5/B, Mahakali Caves Road, Chakala, Gundavali, Near Sai Palace Hotel, Andheri East, Mumbai - 400093.

topPlaces.name: Western Express Highway metro station
topPlaces.description: Western Express Highway (WEH) is an elevated metro station on the Blue Line 1 of Mumbai Metro serving the Andheri suburb of Mumbai, India. It is the flagship station of the line and was opened to the public on 8 June 2014.

topPlaces.name: House of Love (Mumbai)
topPlaces.description: House of Love (Mumbai) (Sneha Sadan) houses homeless children in the area of Mumbai, India, along with other services. It is a work of the Society of Jesus.

topPlaces.name: Gundavali metro station
topPlaces.description: Gundavali is the elevated southern terminal metro station on the North-South corridor of the Red Line 7 of Mumbai Metro in Mumbai, India. This metro station was inaugurated on 20 January 2023 by Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

topPlaces.name: Chakala
topPlaces.description: Chakala is a locality in the suburb of Andheri in Mumbai. Administratively, it is a village in the Andheri taluka of the Mumbai Suburban district.

topPlaces.name: Jogeshwari
topPlaces.description: Jogeshwari (Pronunciation: [d͡ʒoɡeːʃʋəɾiː]) is a suburb located in the western part of Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. It is notable for Jogeshwari Caves - one of the oldest and biggest Hindu cave temples, built in approximately 5th century - particularly one containing a shrine of the Hinduism deities Jogeshwari, Shiva and Hanuman.

topPlaces.name: Chakala (J. B. Nagar) metro station
topPlaces.description: Chakala (J.B. Nagar) (Officially known as IndusInd Bank Chakala (J.B. Nagar)) is an elevated metro station on the East-West Corridor of the Blue Line 1 of Mumbai Metro, serving the JB Nagar neighbourhood of Andheri in Mumbai. It was opened to the public on 8 June 2014.

topPlaces.name: Andheri metro station
topPlaces.description: Andheri (also called Mutual Funds Sahi hai Andheri for sponsorship reasons) is an elevated metro station on the East-West Corridor of the Blue Line 1 of Mumbai Metro serving the Andheri suburb of Mumbai, India. It was opened to the public on 8 June 2014.

topPlaces.name: Andheri
topPlaces.description: Andheri ([ən̪d̪ʱeɾiː]) is a suburb situated in Western Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport, Mumbai (3 km) and the nearest railway station is Mumbai CSMT (20 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala?
faq.a: Stays in Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gurdwara Guru Nanak Punjabi Sabha Chakala?
faq.a: The top attractions are Western Express Highway metro station, House of Love (Mumbai), Gundavali metro station, Chakala, Jogeshwari.
